problem id: 111296b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10001110 -> 10001011
  00100111 -> 01000110
  00010001 -> 11110111
  11001011 -> 00100001
  10001011 -> 00100011
  01100011 -> 01100100
  00000010 -> 11101111
  11011100 -> 00011001
  11101100 -> 10011001
  01001001 -> 00110101

query: 01010110
predicted answer: 01001101
